search_queries_used: DHA telehealth constipation clinical guideline PDF
population_applicability: Broad constipation population appears applicable, but no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact source is limited to DHA-licensed telehealth services.
UAE_applicability: Verified for Dubai and DHA-licensed telehealth only; broader UAE applicability is not asserted.
recency_verification: Official Version/Issue 2 copy opened on 2026-07-11; document states revision date 2029-02-21.
superseded_check: DHA official telehealth portal checked on 2026-07-11; no newer official issue was identified there.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped bowel frequency, stool character, straining, incomplete evacuation, bleeding, abdominal pain, and medication context.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies nature, onset, duration, bowel diary, secondary causes, straining, incomplete evacuation, abdominal pain, bleeding, and medication context.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped bleeding, weight-loss, and family-history prompts.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists new onset in older people, anaemia, rectal bleeding, family history, tenesmus, weight loss, and persistent unresponsive constipation.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped blood and imaging documentation only in the stated persistent or suspected-disease context.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Limits laboratory and colorectal imaging evaluation to persistent, unresponsive, or suspected secondary disease.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Reviewed to verify escalation criteria; no autonomous referral instruction was mapped.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists emergency bleeding and specialist referral criteria for constipation.

unresolved_source_gaps: The baseline workflow is setting-agnostic and broader than the exact source.
The IBS diagnosis label, obstruction chip, and treatment choices remain unsupported by the exact mapped sections.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
